title: Falcon - Pair Headset with Charge Stand
scenario: Charge Stand information persists in Device Settings > Software Update tab after removing headset, restarting device, or restarting app
steps: 1. Open the Poly Studio Mobile app and go to the Home screen.
2. Place the Poly headset on the Charge Stand.
3. Observe the Home screen for the charging icon.
4. Navigate to Device Settings → [Device Name] → Software Update tab.
5. Verify that the Charge Stand information is displayed in the Software Update tab.
6. Remove the headset from the Charge Stand.
7. Check that the Charge Stand information still persists in Device Settings → [Device Name] → Software Update tab.
9. Open the Poly Studio Mobile app and navigate to Device Settings → [Device Name] → Software Update tab.
10. Verify that the Charge Stand information is still displayed.
11. Restart the Poly Studio Mobile app (force close and reopen).
12. Navigate to Device Settings → [Device Name] → Software Update tab.
13. Verify that the Charge Stand information is still displayed.
expected: The charging icon appears on the Home screen when the headset is placed on the Charge Stand. The Charge Stand information appears in Device Settings > Software Update tab and persists after removing the headset from the stand, restarting the device, and restarting the app.
